source:
{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Agricultural Data Cleaning and Processing\n",
    "This notebook cleans the agricultural miscellaneous data from CSV file"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Import required libraries\n",
    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "from datetime import datetime\n",
    "import warnings\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Load the data\n",
    "file_path = 'agri_misc_data_v1.csv'\n",
    "df = pd.read_csv(file_path)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Display basic information\n",
    "print(\"Original Data Shape:\", df.shape)\n",
    "print(\"\\nFirst few rows:\")\n",
    "df.head()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Remove empty rows at the end\n",
    "df = df.dropna(how='all')\n",
    "print(\"After removing empty rows:\", df.shape)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Rename columns for better readability\n",
    "df.columns = ['Crop'] + [f'Year_{col}' for col in df.columns[1:]]\n",
    "\n",
    "# Display cleaned column names\n",
    "print(\"Cleaned Column Names:\")\n",
    "print(df.columns.tolist())"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Check for missing values\n",
    "print(\"Missing Values:\\n\")\n",
    "print(df.isnull().sum())\n",
    "\n",
    "# Check data types\n",
    "print(\"\\nData Types:\")\n",
    "print(df.dtypes)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Convert year columns to numeric (if any are strings)\n",
    "for col in df.columns[1:]:\n",
    "    df[col] = pd.to_numeric(df[col], errors='coerce')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Check for any conversion issues\n",
    "print(\"After numeric conversion - Data Types:\")\n",
    "print(df.dtypes)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Handle any potential missing values after conversion\n",
    "print(\"Missing values after conversion:\")\n",
    "print(df.isnull().sum())\n",
    "\n",
    "# Fill any NaN values with appropriate values (if needed)\n",
    "# For this dataset, we'll use forward fill for any missing crop values\n",
    "df = df.fillna(method='ffill')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Remove any duplicate rows\n",
    "df = df.drop_duplicates()\n",
    "print(\"After removing duplicates:\", df.shape)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Strip any whitespace from crop names\n",
    "df['Crop'] = df['Crop'].str.strip()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Display cleaned crop names\n",
    "print(\"Unique crops in dataset:\")\n",
    "print(df['Crop'].unique())"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Reshape data from wide to long format for better analysis\n",
    "df_long = pd.melt(df, \n",
    "                   id_vars=['Crop'], \n",
    "                   var_name='Year', \n",
    "                   value_name='Index_Value')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Extract year from the column name\n",
    "df_long['Year'] = df_long['Year'].str.replace('Year_', '')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Sort by Crop and Year\n",
    "df_long = df_long.sort_values(['Crop', 'Year']).reset_index(drop=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Long format data shape:\", df_long.shape)\n",
    "df_long.head()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Calculate additional metrics\n",
    "# 1. Year-over-year percentage change for each crop\n",
    "df_long['YoY_Pct_Change'] = df_long.groupby('Crop')['Index_Value'].pct_change() * 100\n",
    "\n",
    "# 2. Cumulative growth since base year (2004-05)\n",
    "df_long['Cumulative_Growth'] = (df_long.groupby('Crop')['Index_Value'].transform(lambda x: x / x.iloc[0]) * 100)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Data with additional metrics:\")\n",
    "df_long.head(10)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Summary statistics\n",
    "print(\"=\"*50)\n",
    "print(\"SUMMARY STATISTICS\")\n",
    "print(\"=\"*50)\n",
    "print(\"\\nOverall Statistics:\")\n",
    "print(df_long['Index_Value'].describe())\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"\\nStatistics by Crop:\")\n",
    "print(df_long.groupby('Crop')['Index_Value'].agg(['mean', 'min', 'max', 'std']))\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"\\nYears in dataset:\")\n",
    "print(df_long['Year'].unique())"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Check for outliers using IQR method\n",
    "Q1 = df_long['Index_Value'].quantile(0.25)\n",
    "Q3 = df_long['Index_Value'].quantile(0.75)\n",
    "IQR = Q3 - Q1\n",
    "lower_bound = Q1 - 1.5 * IQR\n",
    "upper_bound = Q3 + 1.5 * IQR\n",
    "\n",
    "outliers = df_long[(df_long['Index_Value'] < lower_bound) | (df_long['Index_Value'] > upper_bound)]\n",
    "print(f\"Number of potential outliers: {len(outliers)}\")\n",
    "if len(outliers) > 0:\n",
    "    print(\"\\nOutlier rows:\")\n",
    "    print(outliers)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Create final cleaned datasets\n",
    "\n",
    "# 1. Wide format (original structure but cleaned)\n",
    "cleaned_wide = df.copy()\n",
    "\n",
    "# 2. Long format (for time series analysis)\n",
    "cleaned_long = df_long.copy()\n",
    "\n",
    "# 3. Summary by crop (aggregated)\n",
    "crop_summary = df_long.groupby('Crop').agg({\n",
    "    'Index_Value': ['mean', 'min', 'max', 'std'],\n",
    "    'YoY_Pct_Change': ['mean', 'std']\n",
    "}).round(2)\n",
    "crop_summary.columns = ['Mean_Index', 'Min_Index', 'Max_Index', 'Std_Index', \n",
    "                        'Mean_YoY_Change', 'Std_YoY_Change']\n",
    "crop_summary = crop_summary.reset_index()\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Crop Summary Table:\")\n",
    "crop_summary"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Save cleaned datasets to CSV files\n",
    "\n",
    "# 1. Wide format\n",
    "cleaned_wide.to_csv('cleaned_agri_data_wide.csv', index=False)\n",
    "print(\"✓ Saved: cleaned_agri_data_wide.csv\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# 2. Long format\n",
    "cleaned_long.to_csv('cleaned_agri_data_long.csv', index=False)\n",
    "print(\"✓ Saved: cleaned_agri_data_long.csv\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# 3. Crop summary\n",
    "crop_summary.to_csv('crop_summary_statistics.csv', index=False)\n",
    "print(\"✓ Saved: crop_summary_statistics.csv\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# 4. Save as Excel with multiple sheets (optional)\n",
    "with pd.ExcelWriter('cleaned_agri_data_complete.xlsx', engine='openpyxl') as writer:\n",
    "    cleaned_wide.to_excel(writer, sheet_name='Wide_Format', index=False)\n",
    "    cleaned_long.to_excel(writer, sheet_name='Long_Format', index=False)\n",
    "    crop_summary.to_excel(writer, sheet_name='Crop_Summary', index=False)\n",
    "print(\"✓ Saved: cleaned_agri_data_complete.xlsx (Excel format with multiple sheets)\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Final verification of cleaned data\n",
    "print(\"\\n\" + \"=\"*50)\n",
    "print(\"FINAL CLEANING SUMMARY\")\n",
    "print(\"=\"*50)\n",
    "print(f\"\\nOriginal data shape: (13, 9)\")\n",
    "print(f\"Cleaned wide format shape: {cleaned_wide.shape}\")\n",
    "print(f\"Cleaned long format shape: {cleaned_long.shape}\")\n",
    "print(f\"\\nNumber of crops: {cleaned_wide['Crop'].nunique()}\")\n",
    "print(f\"Year range: {cleaned_long['Year'].min()} to {cleaned_long['Year'].max()}\")\n",
    "print(f\"Total records: {len(cleaned_long)}\")\n",
    "print(f\"\\nMissing values in cleaned data: {cleaned_long.isnull().sum().sum()}\")\n",
    "print(f\"Duplicate rows in cleaned data: {cleaned_long.duplicated().sum()}\")\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"\\n✅ Data cleaning completed successfully!\")\n",
    "print(\"\\nGenerated files:\")\n",
    "print(\"1. cleaned_agri_data_wide.csv - Original wide format (cleaned)\")\n",
    "print(\"2. cleaned_agri_data_long.csv - Long format for time series analysis\")\n",
    "print(\"3. crop_summary_statistics.csv - Statistical summary by crop\")\n",
    "print(\"4. cleaned_agri_data_complete.xlsx - Excel file with all sheets\")"
   ]
  }
 ],
